Headline: #6 Jackson Park Express, #2 Hyde Park Express, #28 Stony Island Temporary Northbound Reroute near Stony Island/57th
ShortDescription: Northbound #6 Jackson Park Express, #2 Hyde Park Express, #28 Stony Island rerouted in due to street blockage near Stony Island/57th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Northbound #6 Jackson Park Express, #2 Hyde Park Express, #28 Stony Island rerouted in due to street blockage near Stony Island/57th. 

#6 Jackson Park Express & #28 Stony Island, buses will operate via Stony Island, 59th, Cornell, 57th, Hyde Park Blv then resume their normal route.

#2 Hyde Park Express buses will operate via Stony Island, 59th St., Cornell, 57th St, then resume their normal route.

Allow extra travel time.
